matched_strings: CREATE TABLE NoteFlags (		rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, 		Type INTEGER NOT NULL, 		Shape INTEGER NOT NULL, 		Status INTEGER NOT NULL, 		Label TEXT NOT NULL, 		PageElementRowId INTEGER NOT NULL)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE HashtagContents USING fts4(tokenize=simple '' ' *-', Hashtag)
CREATE TABLE Hashtags (		rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, 		PageElementRowId INTEGER)
CREATE TRIGGER HashtagsCleanup AFTER DELETE ON Hashtags FOR EACH ROW 		BEGIN 			DELETE FROM HashtagContents WHERE HashtagContents.rowid = OLD.rowid; 		END
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE EntityContents USING fts4(tokenize=simple '' ' *-', Terms)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE PageElementContents USING fts4(tokenize=simple '' ' *-', Terms)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE NoteFlagContents USING fts4(tokenize=simple '' ' *-', Terms)

CREATE TRIGGER EntityCleanup AFTER DELETE ON Entities FOR EACH ROW 		BEGIN 			DELETE FROM EntityContents WHERE EntityContents.rowid = OLD.rowid; 			DELETE FROM PageElements WHERE PageElements.EntityRowId = OLD.rowid; 		END

CREATE TABLE Entities (		rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, 		Type INTEGER, 		GOID NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, 		GUID NVARCHAR(38) NOT NULL, 		GOSID NVARCHAR(50), 		ParentGOID NVARCHAR(50), 		GrandparentGOIDs TEXT, 		ContentRID NVARCHAR(50), 		RootRevGenCount INTEGER, 		LastModifiedTime INTEGER, 		RecentTime INTEGER, 		PinTime INTEGER, 		Color INTEGER, 		Title TEXT, 		EnterpriseIdentity TEXT)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX EntityGOIDIndex ON Entities (GOID)
CREATE TRIGGER NoteFlagsCleanup AFTER DELETE ON NoteFlags FOR EACH ROW 		BEGIN 			DELETE FROM NoteFlagContents WHERE NoteFlagContents.rowid = OLD.rowid; 		END
CREATE TABLE PageElements (		rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, 		GOID NVARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, 		Text TEXT, 		Jcid INTEGER, 		EntityRowId INTEGER)

CREATE TRIGGER PageElementsCleanup AFTER DELETE ON PageElements FOR EACH ROW 		BEGIN 			DELETE FROM PageElementContents WHERE PageElementContents.rowid = OLD.rowid; 			DELETE FROM Hashtags WHERE Hashtags.PageElementRowId = OLD.rowid; 			DELETE FROM NoteFlags WHERE NoteFlags.PageElementRowId = OLD.rowid; 		END

CREATE TABLE Violations (		rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, 		EntityID INTEGER NOT NULL, 		Name TEXT, 		Type INTEGER NOT NULL, 		Location INTEGER NOT NULL, 		SelectionStartIndex INTEGER, 		SelectionEndIndex INTEGER, 		FOREIGN KEY(EntityID) REFERENCES Entities(rowid))
CREATE TRIGGER ViolationsCleanupAfterDelete AFTER DELETE ON Entities FOR EACH ROW 		BEGIN 			DELETE FROM Violations WHERE Violations.EntityID = OLD.rowid; 		END

CREATE TABLE ViolationElements (		rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, 		ViolationID INTEGER, 		ElementGOID NVARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, 		FOREIGN KEY(ViolationID) REFERENCES Violations(rowid))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ElementGOIDIndex ON ViolationElements (ViolationID, ElementGOID)
